dumps.title: Studio Infrastructure Setup
dumps.summary: 7 GitHub orgs created. All repos renamed to app. Agent permissions set. Vercel Discord auth wired. Security cleanup. No agent Vercel access (permanent).
keyDecisions: Org per project — forcryptomarket, 67community, wjpstudio, etc.
Repo name = app always. Org name = brand.
Kodo write on wjpstudio/app only. All others fork+PR.
pending: Yama + Kodo org invites — PATs need read:org scope
westonjamespalmer/app — empty repo, no code yet

dumps.title: Overnight Sprint + Morning Feed
dumps.summary: Yama: 8 commits — 22 product memes, 5 bundle cards, Remotion stills, Paper.js, meme research, FC growth doc, Week 1 calendar. 9 tweets processed. 7 content formats identified. OS rules updated.
keyDecisions: No good night messages ever — 24/7 mandate
Test-first bug protocol: reproduce → fix → prove
Products bridge: both teams push to dashboard/data/
pending: Kodo: Access Content buttons, auth wall, file download
WJP: connect wallet, upload 10 products, delete QA listing
